description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on every push to any branch and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions, including 2.7, pypy2, 3.5, 3.7, 3.8, and pypy3. The job should start a Redis and a Memcached service, then check out the repository, cache dependencies, set up the Python version, install dependencies, run tests with coverage, and report coverage to Coveralls.
